title: Coordination with Migrant Workers Offices. The powers and functions
content: 54 of the MWPB shall be without prejudice to the provision of legal assistance to victims, the 55 conduct of investigation, and the filing of relevant cases by the MWOs within their 56 respective jurisdictions, subject to domestic and other applicable laws and regulations of 57 the host country. These, however, shall be coordinated with and reported to the MWPB 58 for purposes of documentation, monitoring, and inter-agency coordination. 59 60 26 Further, the MWOs may coordinate with the MWPB in the investigation and preparation 1 of pleadings and complaint-affidavits for seafarer victims of illegal recruitment, trafficking 2 in persons, and related cases within their respective jurisdictions. 3 4 5 Complaints and Reports filed with the Department 6 7
